ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal And For Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tomases for petitioner.

Mr. Tomases requested the matter be dismissed. The Court granted the Dismissal without prejudice (signing the Order for same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal And For Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Continued To Nov-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal And For Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-08-2007 Continued To Sep-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: PETER J. TAMASES, APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER; ROBERT GOTTSCHALK, APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

COUNSEL STATES THAT THERE AR STILL THREE MEDIATIONS THAT THEY WOULD LIKE TO USE. HE IS REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE. MATTER CONTINUED TO 9/19/07.

JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CSR #11722; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; BALIFF:M. LOOS

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Continued To Aug-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal And For Accounting
Off Calendar May-30-2007 Continued To Jul-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Tamases appearing for petitioner. Parties have reached a settlement. They are drafting the settlement agreement. Counsel is requesting for continuance. Matter is continued to 7/11.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Tom Bradley.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal And For Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Continued To May-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Tamases appearing for Zenadaida Graves. Mediation is set for 5/21. Counsel is requesting for continuance. Mr. Tamases will file the stipulation. Matter is continued to 5/30.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Peter J Tamases appearing for and with petitioner Zenadaida Graves. Robert Gottschalk appearing for respondents Yolanda and Emmanuel Padlan. Yolanda Padlan is in court. Parties have reached a stipulation. Yolanda and Emmanuel Padlan will resign as trustees. Zenadaida Graves will become the trustee without bond until sale of the real property. Accounting will be continue for 60 days for parties to mediate. No rent due from Yolanda during the continue period. Zenadaida as the trustee will have reasonable access to the house with reasonable notice. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 4/18. Matter is continued to 4/24/07 for status. Order referring case to pro bono mediation signed. Mr. Tamases will prepare the order on the stipulation.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Continued To Jan-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases (Counsel for Petitioners).

Mr. Tamases appeared to set the matter for evidentiary hearing which date was set for January 19, 2007 between the hours of 9:00 a.m. and 1:00 p.m. (without breaking for lunch) in Dept. 204. Mr. Tamases is to notice all parties of the hearing date.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Trudy Verzosa.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Continued To Nov-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Grace robinson appearing for Peter Tamases. Parties are having settlement negotiation. Counsel is requesting for continuance for 4 weeks. Matter is continued to 11/8. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Continued To Oct-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Tamases appearing for petitioners. Counsel is requesting for continuance to resolve the matter. The siblings are beginning to talk. Matter is continued to 10/11. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Floyd Butler. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Declaratory Finding
Off Calendar Apr-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Peter Tamases appearing for petitioner. No opposition filed. Court finds it does not violate the no contest clause. Court is not ordering payment of attorney fees. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
